description_long: This guard rail is a long, linear safety barrier constructed primarily from metal, featuring a rectangular cross-section and a flat top surface. The main rail is adorned with a prominent yellow and black diagonal striped pattern, which serves as a high-visibility warning for both pedestrians and vehicles. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with two visible mounting holes at each terminal, suggesting secure attachment to the ground or a supporting structure. The surface appears hard and slightly matte, with minor signs of wear or weathering, typical for outdoor urban infrastructure. The rail is designed to prevent vehicles or people from crossing into restricted or hazardous areas, commonly found along roadsides, parking lots, or industrial zones. Its robust construction and visual cues indicate a focus on both safety and durability in high-traffic environments.
description: A long, rectangular metal guard rail with yellow and black diagonal warning stripes and blunt, squared ends. It is designed for high-visibility safety in urban environments.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the blunt, squared terminal with two mounting holes visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rail and the yellow-black diagonal warning stripes.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, identical to view 0, with blunt end and mounting holes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the full length and warning stripes, mirroring view 1.
